series_metadata.series_title: Sales Representative Files on Distribution and Training
series_metadata.series_description: Sales Representative Zip Codes/District Assignments and Distribution Cycle, Route Lists, training schedules, seminar content and instructors, related correspondence between Regional Offices and Marketing Division management and training Department of Lottery Central.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: digital copy in system information is updated or superseded, or no longer of value
